steps.title: Identify the definition
steps.content: The underlined portion defines convergent evolution as the independent evolution of the same trait in separate lineages. The rest of the passage then discusses studies of that phenomenon.

steps.title: State the function
steps.content: A says the portion gives examples of studies, C says it clarifies confusion in the studies, and D treats the phenomenon as a method. Its function is to give a basic description of the central idea before the discussion continues. The answer is B.
